case_title: RAJESHWAR PATEL VS. TUESDAY WOO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 190 O'FARRELL STREET #316 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR SERVED AUG-08-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.33. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY
DECLARATION OF HOWARD OLSEN IN SUPOORT OF CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAJESHWAR AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, TUESDAY
